runs.context_blueprint: {"language": "Python", "build_system": "pip", "package_manager": "pip", "build_commands": ["pip install -r requirements.txt"], "install_commands": ["apt-get update -y && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends build-essential libxml2-dev libxslt1-dev zlib1g-dev && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*"], "runtime_requirements": {"language_version": "3.12", "system_packages": ["build-essential", "libxml2-dev", "libxslt1-dev", "zlib1g-dev"]}, "repo_type": "data_pipeline", "base_image": "python:3.12.13-bookworm", "base_image_rationale": "Official Python 3.12 image on Debian bookworm aligns with project dependencies (bs4, lxml, pymongo).", "pitfalls": ["pymongo==3.10.1 may not be compatible with Python 3.12; installation may fail or runtime may break.", "lxml building may require system dev libraries; ensure apt-get installs libxml2-dev and libxslt1-dev.", "PyMongo 3.10.x has known compatibility issues with newer MongoDB servers.", "The crawler runs an infinite loop; consider using a supervisor or proper restart policies in container runtime.", "No database or API endpoint is included in the image; expose or configure MONGO_URI and API access via environment variables."], "notes": "The crawler fetches data from DXY pneumonia page and writes to MongoDB via the DB module. No port is exposed; runtime depends on network access and MongoDB availability."}
runs.final_dockerfile:
FROM python:3.12.13-bookworm

# Install system dependencies required for building Python packages (e.g., lxml)
RUN apt-get update -y \
    && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
        build-essential \
        libxml2-dev \
        libxslt1-dev \
        zlib1g-dev \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Ensure /bin/sh is bash to improve shell quoting reliability in smoke tests
RUN ln -sf /bin/bash /bin/sh

# Create app directory
WORKDIR /app

# Install Python dependencies first (layer caching benefits)
COPY requirements.txt .
RUN pip install --no-cache-dir -r requirements.txt

# Copy the project source
COPY . .

# Environment variables
ENV MONGO_URI=""
ENV API_BASE_URL=""
ENV PYTHONUNBUFFERED=1

# Basic smoke test to ensure main.py exists in image
RUN ["sh", "-c", "test -f main.py"]

# Run the crawler
CMD ["python", "main.py"]

FROM python:3.12.13-bookworm

# Install system dependencies required for building Python packages (e.g., lxml)
RUN apt-get update -y \
    && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
        build-essential \
        libxml2-dev \
        libxslt1-dev \
        zlib1g-dev \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Ensure /bin/sh is bash to improve shell quoting reliability in smoke tests
RUN ln -sf /bin/bash /bin/sh

# Create app directory
WORKDIR /app

# Install Python dependencies first (layer caching benefits)
COPY requirements.txt .
RUN pip install --no-cache-dir -r requirements.txt

# Copy the project source
COPY . .

# Environment variables
ENV MONGO_URI=""
ENV API_BASE_URL=""
ENV PYTHONUNBUFFERED=1

# Basic smoke test to ensure main.py exists in image
RUN ["sh", "-c", "test -f main.py"]

# Run the crawler
CMD ["python", "main.py"]
